commandsRun.summary: Confirmed equal-width launcher/update transitions expose the stale running-animation defect.
No noninteractive test harness was present and qmllint was unavailable.

validationOutput: AppLauncher and UpdateSelector both have implicitWidth 480.
StatusData switches them through an intermediate workspace state.
The no-delta branch does not stop the animation started by that intermediate state.
residualRisks: Exact rendered timing and endpoint frames were not validated in a running compositor.
Other rapid state sequences may expose the same stale-animation behavior until both no-delta branches cancel active animations.
childReport.diffSummary: The unstaged Bar.qml diff replaces width/height Behaviors with independent two-phase fixed-8px SequentialAnimations. The guide documents that contract. The files also contain staged app-launcher work, and NowPlayingIndicator has unrelated unstaged changes.
reviewFindings: blocker: home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/Bar.qml:218-224 - an equal final width does not cancel an animation started by an intermediate target, causing app-launcher/update transitions to collapse toward workspace width.
note: home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/Bar.qml:230-236 - the identical height branch should also cancel an active animation when no new height movement is required.
